calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Nightingale appeared in person for Catherine Banchieri (petitioner).

THe petition was taken under submission with the Court's intent to grant in part and deny in part. Granted as to a 1/3 interest in the real property as property passing to petitioner spouse without probate, but denied as to the remaining 2/3 passing to the decedent's 2 children subject to probate.

"However, the Court shared its observation with counsel that the children's disclaimers were not effective under Probate Code section 285 because they assigned their interests before they signed the disclaimers. Then the Court indicated its intent to grant the petition only as to 1/3 of the property as a spousal interest, rather than the entire property."

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
